problem_text_cn: 1. 半径为R的圆环在水平地面纯滚动（前进速度v₀为常量），求圆环上任意点P的加速度最大值aₘₐₓ与最小值aₘᵢₙ之差；2. 求滚轮线最低处曲率半径ρ₁和最高处曲率半径ρ₂；3. 小球沿摆线轨道无摩擦往返运动（等时摆），求运动周期T（与小球质量、初始位置无关）。
problem_text_en: 1. A ring of radius R rolls without slipping on a horizontal ground（forward speed v₀ is constant），find the difference between the maximum acceleration aₘₐₓ and minimum acceleration aₘᵢₙ of any point P on the ring；2. Find the radius of curvature ρ₁ at the lowest point and ρ₂ at the highest point of the cycloid；3. A small ball moves back and forth without friction along a cycloid track（isochronous pendulum），find the motion period T（independent of the ball's mass and initial position）.
problem_solution_cn: （1）加速度差值：- 取环心参考系（匀速直线运动，惯性系），P点作匀速圆周运动，加速度大小恒为a=v₀²/R（仅向心加速度）；- 地面系中加速度与环心系相同，故aₘₐₓ=aₘᵢₙ=a，差值为0。（2）滚轮线曲率半径：- 最低处：速度v₁=0，向心加速度a=v₀²/R，由a=v₁²/ρ₁得ρ₁=0；- 最高处：速度v₂=2v₀，向心加速度a=v₀²/R，由a=v₂²/ρ₂得ρ₂=4R。（3）等时摆周期：- 摆线最低处曲率半径ρ=ρ₂=4R，等效单摆摆长l=4R；- 单摆周期T=2π√(l/g)，故等时摆周期T=4π√(R/g)。
problem_solution_en: （1）Difference in acceleration：- Take the ring center reference frame（uniform linear motion，inertial frame），point P performs uniform circular motion，acceleration magnitude is constant a=v₀²/R（only centripetal acceleration）；- The acceleration in the ground frame is the same as that in the ring center frame，so aₘₐₓ=aₘᵢₙ=a，the difference is 0。（2）Radius of curvature of cycloid：- Lowest point：speed v₁=0，centripetal acceleration a=v₀²/R，obtaining ρ₁=0 from a=v₁²/ρ₁；- Highest point：speed v₂=2v₀，centripetal acceleration a=v₀²/R，obtaining ρ₂=4R from a=v₂²/ρ₂。（3）Period of isochronous pendulum：- The radius of curvature at the lowest point of the cycloid is ρ=ρ₂=4R，equivalent simple pendulum length l=4R；- Simple pendulum period T=2π√(l/g)，thus the period of the isochronous pendulum T=4π√(R/g)。
problem_answer: 1. 加速度差值$a_{max}-a_{min}=0$；2. 最低处曲率半径$ho_1=0$，最高处曲率半径$ho_2=4R$；3. 运动周期$T=4\pi \sqrt{ rac{R}{g}{}}$
